title: MC: Distant Worlds
description: "Distant Worlds" is a Vanilla+ modpack, mainly focused on visuals and immersion.
body:
#  **DISTANT WORLDS**

MC: Distant Worlds is a Vanilla+ oriented modpack focused on graphics and immersion. Trying to bring you into the world, not just play in it. Also with shaders, it isn't just a block game "wif funi litin" anymore.

## **FEATURES**

- Distant Horizons
- Terralith
- Better Nether/End
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Fresh Animations (*And Fresh Moves)
- The YUNG's Structure Set
- Journey Map
- [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions)
- [Mandela's GUI - Dark Mode](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)
- [Bliss Shader (Github Version)](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)

*See the Fresh Moves [documentation](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki) to know how to use it.

## So what are you waiting for?!

Download the modpack now!
